ques: Find the latest Diffusion-related blog on Hugging Face, and read its intro or overview section to roughly summarize the content of the blog.
answer: The latest Diffusion blog is "Waypoint-1.5: Higher-Fidelity Interactive Worlds for Everyday GPUs" (Overworld, April 9, 2026). Its overview introduces Waypoint-1.5, a real-time generative video world model that builds on Waypoint-1 to bring interactive, explorable AI worlds to everyday consumer GPUs (RTX 3090–5090) at up to 720p/60 FPS, plus a new 360p tier for laptops and soon Apple Silicon — trained on ~100× more data for more coherent, responsive worlds runnable locally instead of on datacenter clusters.
